role_title: Senior Programs & Business Operations Lead, Airbnb Services

location.office_time_required: occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager

seniority.level: Senior IC / Staff (likely equivalent to Staff or Principal)
level_signals: 12+ years of experience in business operations, program management, or strategy roles
Base pay range $204,000–$249,000 USD consistent with senior IC at a major tech company
Expected to influence executive leadership and drive accountability across diverse, cross-functional teams

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 12+ years of experience in business operations, program management, or strategy roles within high-growth businesses.
Demonstrated ability to build and scale new businesses or programs, with a proven track record of driving cross-functional alignment.
You possess the ability to not just draft a strategic playbook, but to operationalize the plan; standing up programs, building processes, and driving execution in complex global markets.

Highly analytical and data-driven. SQL proficiency is required. Ability to independently pull data, run complex analyses, distill insights, and translate them into clear, actionable business strategies and plans.
Exceptional communication and relationship-building skills. Demonstrated ability to influence executive leadership and drive accountability across diverse, cross-functional teams.
Expertise in driving collaboration across diverse teams, fostering transparency, accountability, and a unified vision.
Comfortable navigating ambiguity and fast-paced environments. A strategic thinker with the creativity to design novel business models, incentive structures, and operational frameworks.
Capable of developing tools and systems to enhance processes, interpreting business risks, and recommending best practices to drive operational efficiency at scale.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Marketplace experience, particularly within a digital company, is preferred.

scope.surface: Airbnb Services business — emerging travel-adjacent service categories, global expansion from concept to launch and scale
scope.business_model: marketplace, travel-adjacent services (B2C and B2B supply partnerships)
core_responsibilities: Develop and implement end-to-end program plans for the launch and scaling of new service categories
Drive go-to-market planning and execution across geographies
Serve as a connective leader across Business Operations, Market Management, and Product Pods
Drive alignment among engineering, design, marketing, and legal teams toward shared targets
Leverage advanced analytical skills, including writing SQL queries, to independently extract insights from raw data
Build financial models, size market opportunities, and establish rigorous KPIs
Evaluate and execute supply sourcing strategies for emerging categories
Build the operational foundation required to scale new service categories
Identify bottlenecks in the funnel and develop contingency plans for risks
Translate local market feedback into scalable requirements

compensation.equity_form: bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits also mentioned as potential eligibility

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($204K–$249K base)
Bonus and equity mentioned as additional eligibility
Fully remote-US eligible with no stated hard office requirement beyond occasional offsites
Clear product surface and business context (Airbnb Services expansion)
Role has real strategic ownership, not just execution support
red_flags: Must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity — some states are excluded, creating geographic restrictions for a nominally remote role
12+ years minimum is a high bar that may screen out strong candidates with 8-11 years
No visa sponsorship information explicitly stated; work auth status is unclear
Very broad scope (strategy + program management + analytics + supply + operations) could indicate understaffing or unclear role boundaries

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from compensation range and years required)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; KPI examples are stated in JD but full metric set is inferred)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and supply strategy context)
location.work_auth (inferred as no-sponsorship given US-state entity requirement and no sponsorship mention)
ambiguities: Work authorization and visa sponsorship are not explicitly addressed in the JD. The requirement to live in a state where Airbnb has a registered entity implies US residency but does not clarify sponsorship eligibility.
The JD says 'Remote Eligible' but also notes 'occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites' — treated as remote-us with light hybrid expectations.
Excluded states list is referenced but not enumerated in the JD body.
